message:
fix: 2 correctness bugs — window BETWEEN parse, window sum/avg null frames; extract rowPassesFilters (-61 lines)

Correctness:
- parser: consume optional BETWEEN keyword in window frame clause (ROWS BETWEEN ... AND ...)
- operators: window aggregate sum/avg return null (not 0) when frame has only null values

Code reduction:
- Extract rowPassesFilters() in decode.ts — shared by 4 call sites (decode, FilterOperator, MaterializedExecutor, QueryDO)
- Replaces 15-20 line inline filter patterns with single function calls
